mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.subject_id, c.type, c.rate, c.ep_status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, s.name, s.name_cn, s.image, s.score, s.eps, s.air_date, s.type AS subject_type FROM user_collection c JOIN subject s ON s.id = c.subject_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.type = #{type} ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
